title: Migrate subscriptions to Stripe Billing using toolkit
excerpt: Learn how to migrate your existing subscriptions to Stripe using the toolkit. Use the [Billing migration toolkit](https://dashboard.stripe.com/billing/migrations) in the Stripe Dashboard to migrate your existing subscriptions from a third-party system, a home-grown system, or an existing Stripe account to Stripe Billing. 1. If you haven’t already, review the [migration stages](https://docs.stripe.com/billing/subscriptions/migrate-subscriptions.md#migration-stages). 1. [Set up a Stripe Billing integration](https://docs.stripe.com/billing/subscriptions/build-subscriptions.md) before you begin migration. This is a one-time setup that you don’t need to repeat for future migrations. 1.…
